examples:
Command Example
Context Example
7. Get case information
Get information for a specified on a case. All arguments are optional, but you must specify at least one for the command to execute successfully.
Base Command
salesforce-get-case
Input
Argument Name
name: salesforce-get-case

outputs.description: Case Object ID SalesForce.Case.CaseNumber Case number
outputs.name: SalesForce.Case.ID

outputs.description: date Time case was created SalesForce.Case.ClosedDate
outputs.name: SalesForce.Case.CreateDate

outputs.description: Time case was closed SalesForce.Case.Owner Case owner
outputs.name: date

outputs.description: Priority of the case (Low, Medium, High) SalesForce.Case.Origin How case originated (Web, Phone, Email)
outputs.name: SalesForce.Case.Priority

outputs.description: Case status (New, Escalated, On Hold, or Closed) SalesForce.Case.Reason
outputs.name: SalesForce.Case.Status
